title: ActivityLogEntry
description: An entry in the activity log representing the execution status of a job.

objectId.description: The ID of the task or object.

objectName.description: The name of the task or object.

agentId.description: The Secure Agent that ran the job.

state.description: The job execution state. Common values are 1 (success), 2 (warning), 3 (error).

failedSourceRows.description: The number of source rows that failed.

successSourceRows.description: The number of source rows processed successfully.

failedTargetRows.description: The number of target rows that failed.

successTargetRows.description: The number of target rows written successfully.

totalSuccessRows.description: The total number of rows processed successfully.

totalErrorRows.description: The total number of rows that encountered errors.

errorMsg.description: The error message if the job failed.

startedBy.description: The user who started the job.

runContextType.description: The context in which the job was run (e.g., API, SCHEDULER, UI).
